title: Corn Potato Pancakes
ingredients: 2 cups mashed potatoes (prepared with butter and milk)
instructions:
In large bowl, combine the first 9 ingredients.
In a large skillet heat 1 tbsp of oil; drop four ¼ cupfuls of “batter” into the skillet. Cook for 1-2 minutes on each side or until golden brown. Repeat with the remaining oil and “batter”.
